articles.title: Iran’s Araghchi says US sending ‘contradictory messages’
articles.summary: Iran’s Araghchi says US sending ‘contradictory messages’ Iran’s Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi has blamed Washington for complicating negotiations with “contradictory messages”, in comments carried by Iran’s state broadcaster IRIB. Araghchi said Iran is not to blame for disruptions in the Strait of Hormuz and reiterated Iran’s position that the strait is now open to vessels of “friendly countries”, as long as they coordinate with Iranian officials. He also said Tehran did not initiate the war and is only defending itself.

articles.title: Israeli forces kill Palestinian teenager in West Bank village near Nablus
articles.summary: Israeli forces kill Palestinian teenager in West Bank village near Nablus Israeli forces shot and killed a Palestinian teenager late on Friday night in the village of Al-Lubban ash-Sharqiya, south of Nablus in the occupied West Bank, Wafa news agency reported. Local sources said 16-year-old Fahd Zidan Owais was shot while he was in an open area of the village. The sources added that Israeli forces withheld the teenager’s body and prevented the Palestine Red Crescent Society crews from reaching him.
